sqlMap.select: select EmailDynamicID, DynamicContent_Name, DynamicContent_Description, DynamicContent_Body, RecordType, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DynamicContent_Code from Email_Dynamic_Content_lku where EmailDynamicID = #EmailDynamicID#
sqlMap.update:
update Email_Dynamic_Content_lku set
DynamicContent_Name = #DynamicContent_Name# DynamicContent_Name = null DynamicContent_Description = #DynamicContent_Description# DynamicContent_Description = null DynamicContent_Body = #DynamicContent_Body# DynamicContent_Body = null RecordType = #RecordType# RecordType = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null DynamicContent_Code = #DynamicContent_Code# DynamicContent_Code = null
where EmailDynamicID = #EmailDynamicID#
sqlMap.select: select EmailDynamicID, DynamicContent_Name, DynamicContent_Description, DynamicContent_Body, RecordType, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DynamicContent_Code from Email_Dynamic_Content_lku where EmailDynamicID = #EmailDynamicID#
select EmailDynamicID, DynamicContent_Name, DynamicContent_Description, DynamicContent_Body, RecordType, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DynamicContent_Code from Email_Dynamic_Content_lku
select DynamicContent_Code,DynamicContent_Name from Email_Dynamic_Content_lku where RecordType != 'D'
